<?php namespace Cviebrock\EloquentSluggable\Tests\Models; use Cviebrock\EloquentSluggable\Sluggable; use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model; /** * Class Post. * * @property int $id * @property string $title * @property ?string $subtitle * @property ?string $slug * @property ?string $dummy * @property ?int $author_id */ class Post extends Model { use Sluggable; /** * {@inheritdoc} */ protected $table = 'posts'; /** * {@inheritdoc} */ public $timestamps = false; /** * {@inheritdoc} */ protected $fillable = ['title', 'subtitle', 'slug', 'dummy', 'author_id']; /** * Convert the model to its string representation. * * @return string */ public function __toString() { return $this->title; } /** * Return the sluggable configuration array for this model. */ public function sluggable(): array { return [ 'slug' => [ 'source' => 'title', ], ]; } }
